title: orchis mascula subsp. ichnusae
intro: Orchis mascula subsp. ichnusae, also known as the Italian orchid or Ichnusa orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Orchis mascula subsp. ichnusae include relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as potential anti-cancer properties and improved cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its rhizome and used in traditional medicine, often in the form of infusions, tinctures, or ointments.
